segment.source: Author: Luke Davis <XLTechie@newanswertech.com>, Patrick ZAJDA
segment.target: 作者：Luke Davis <XLTechie@newanswertech.com>、Patrick ZAJDA

segment.source: NVDA compatibility: 2025.3 through 2026.1
Download [stable version][1]
segment.target: 下载 [稳定版][1]

segment.source: For earlier versions of NVDA (back to 2017.3), try [this older version](https://github.com/opensourcesys/sayProductNameAndVersion/releases/download/v2026.2.0/sayProductNameAndVersion-2026.2.0.nvda-addon). Note that some features will be missing.
segment.target: 如需使用更早版本的 NVDA（如降级至 2017.3），请尝试[此旧版](https://github.com/opensourcesys/sayProductNameAndVersion/releases/download/v2026.2.0/sayProductNameAndVersion-2026.2.0.nvda-addon)。请注意，部分功能将不可用。

segment.source: This [NVDA](https://nvaccess.org/) add-on adds a shortcut to announce the name, version, and now the architecture of the foreground application, or copies this information to the clipboard.
segment.target: 此 [NVDA](https://nvaccess.org/) 插件添加了一个快捷键，用于朗读前台应用程序的名称、版本及其架构，或将此信息复制到剪贴板。

segment.source: English keyboard shortcut: `NVDA+shift+v`
segment.target: 英文键盘快捷键：`NVDA+Shift+V`

segment.source: Press it once to hear the information spoken, or receive it in braille.
segment.target: 按一次：通过语音朗读或以盲文呈现这些信息。

segment.source: Press it twice to copy name, version, and architecture to the clipboard, separated by newlines.
segment.target: 连按两次可将名称、版本和架构复制到剪贴板，用换行符分隔。

segment.source: Press it three times to copy only the version and architecture to the clipboard.
segment.target: 连按三次则仅将版本和架构复制到剪贴板。

segment.source: This shortcut may be remapped in the Tools category of NVDA's Input Gestures.
segment.target: 可在 NVDA 按键与手势对话框的“工具”类别中重新设置此快捷键。

segment.source: To access the Windows version, use the shortcut on the Desktop or Taskbar.
segment.target: 要获取 Windows 版本，请在桌面或任务栏上使用此快捷键。

segment.source: It will also work from various other parts of Windows.
segment.target: 在 Windows 的其他多个位置同样有效。

segment.source: To access the NVDA version, use the shortcut while the NVDA menu, add-on store, or similar NVDA interface is open.
segment.target: 要获取 NVDA 版本，请在 NVDA 菜单、插件商店或其他 NVDA 界面打开时使用此快捷键。

segment.source: Please support the add-on
segment.target: 请支持该插件

segment.source: If you like this add-on and are willing to help others decide whether it is useful, please leave a [review][3].
segment.target: 若您喜欢此插件并愿帮助他人评估其实用性，请为其撰写[使用评价][3]。

segment.source: Also, if you are willing to buy me a cup of coffee for maintaining the add-on for the past few years, it is much appreciated!
segment.target: 另外，若您愿意为我过去几年维护此插件请我喝杯咖啡，我将不胜感激！

segment.source: Donations can be made [via this PayPal link](https://www.paypal.me/LukeDavis734).
segment.target: 您可以通过[此 PayPal 链接](https://www.paypal.me/LukeDavis734)进行捐赠。

segment.source: Miscellaneous
segment.target: 其他信息

segment.source: For change history, please read the [changelog][2].
segment.target: 有关更新历史，请查阅[更新日志][2]。

segment.source: [1]: https://www.nvaccess.org/addonStore/legacy?file=sayProductNameAndVersion
segment.target: [1]: https://www.nvaccess.org/addonStore/legacy?file=sayProductNameAndVersion

segment.source: [2]: https://github.com/opensourcesys/sayProductNameAndVersion/blob/master/changes.md#readme
segment.target: [2]: https://github.com/opensourcesys/sayProductNameAndVersion/blob/master/changes.md#readme

segment.source: [3]: https://github.com/nvaccess/addon-datastore/discussions/2683
segment.target: [3]: https://github.com/nvaccess/addon-datastore/discussions/2683
